news.title: The science of spring burning
news.summary_en: Prescribed burns may look dramatic, but they're a critical tool for Flint Hills ranchers working to sustain grasslands and improve cattle grazing.

news.title: Back-to-back national rocketry champs
news.summary_en: The Wildcat Rocketry team took home gold for the second consecutive year at the Argonia Cup, a national collegiate rocketry competition that hosts teams from all over the country.
